# CompanyCard

> CompanyCard (company-card.com) is a digital business card platform for professionals and small-to-medium businesses. Share your contact details in one tap via QR code, sharing link, Apple/Google Wallet pass, or email signature — the recipient needs no app. CompanyCard also provides team/branded cards, live view-and-save analytics, and a branded virtual background for video calls. A free plan is available with no credit card required.

## What CompanyCard is
- Category: digital business card / virtual business card / electronic business card (vCard) software
- Audience: individual professionals, sales teams, and small-to-medium businesses
- Key facts: free plan available; no app required for the person receiving the card; cards update live so shared details never go stale; works with Apple Wallet and Google Wallet; includes QR code, sharing link, email signature, and video-call virtual background; team plans add branding and analytics.
